meaning: n.战斧,屠斧v.以斧砍倒或攻打
examples: The Mace and Poleaxe Specialization talents in the Arms tree will be removed.
Axe Specialization – Renamed "Poleaxe Specialization": Now increases crit chance with Axes and Polearms by 1/2/3/4/5%.
64—A deathsman of the soul Robert Greene called him, Stephen said. Not for nothing was he a butcher's son, wielding the sledded poleaxe and spitting in his palms.
